## Goal

What should be completed?

## Project

Which project does this belong to? (must match a `project:<name>` label and a `projects/<name>/` directory, or `project:self-evo`)

## Type

learn / build / scout / review / memory / rule-proposal

## Context / Sources

Links, background, prior notes, or relevant files.

## Acceptance Evidence

What evidence should exist when this is done?

## Permission Level

read-only / data-write / sandbox / repo-branch-write / external-resource / needs-human

## Resource Requests

Does this need an API, token, paid service, server, GPU, external account, or other resource?

## Expected Outputs

Issue comment / data note / skill note / demo / draft PR / proposal

## Notes

Other constraints or preferences.
